metadata.name: get_test_cases

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: Optional folder ID to filter test cases

parameters.name: max_results

notes: Go stdio-to-remote MCP proxy/transport client. It forwards JSON-RPC to a remote server and has test mock tools, but no repo-owned MCP tool registration/handler.

Full clone contains actual MCP server under landing/mcp-src. createMcpServer registers getAvailableTools(... NEON_TOOLS ...) via server.tool at landing/mcp-src/server/index.ts:95-108; handlers resolved through NEON_HANDLERS in landing/mcp-src/tools/tools.ts.

TypeScript McpServer with two server.tool registrations in src/index.ts.

metadata.name: get-eth-balance
metadata.description: Gets the ETH balance of a given wallet

address.description: The Address of the wallet to fetch the balance

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: The Address of the wallet to fetch the balance

metadata.name: send-eth
metadata.description: Sends a given amount of ETH to a given address

toAddress.description: Address to send the ETH to

amount.description: The amount of ETH to send in numerical form

parameters.name: toAddress
parameters.description: Address to send the ETH to

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of ETH to send in numerical form

notes: Project is an OpenAPI-to-MCP generator. MCP ListTools/CallTool code is in Jinja template openapi_to_mcp/templates/src/server.ts.j2 and generated runtime, not a concrete repo-owned tool surface; no specific generated tools present to extract.
Clone directory contains only .git metadata/shallow.lock and no working tree source files; no tools extracted.
TypeScript low-level MCP Server exposes TOOLS through ListToolsRequestSchema at src/index.ts:659 and dispatches CallToolRequestSchema to handleTool switch at src/index.ts:660-663.

metadata.name: check_setup
metadata.description: ALWAYS call this first. Verifies license tier and which ad platforms are connected. Shows what is available based on your plan (Starter/Pro/Premium/Elite). Use this before any other tool.

metadata.name: get_ad_account_info
metadata.description: Get current balance, total spend, currency, and account status for all connected ad accounts (Meta and/or TikTok). Call before creating campaigns to confirm account is active and has sufficient funds. Requires valid license.

metadata.name: list_meta_campaigns
metadata.description: List all campaigns in the Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad account with campaign ID, name, status (ACTIVE/PAUSED/ARCHIVED), objective, and daily budget. Use campaign IDs to get stats, adjust budgets, or pause/enable. Requires Starter plan or higher.

status.description: Filter by status: ACTIVE, PAUSED, or ARCHIVED. Omit to return all.

metadata.name: create_meta_campaign
metadata.description: Create a complete Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad campaign in one call — campaign + ad set with targeting + creative + ad. Created in PAUSED state. Call enable_meta_campaign to activate. Minimum budget $1/day. Requires Starter plan or higher.

metadata.name: enable_meta_campaign
metadata.description: Activate a paused Meta campaign so it starts spending. Use campaign_id from create_meta_campaign or list_meta_campaigns. Requires Starter plan or higher.

metadata.name: pause_meta_campaign
metadata.description: Pause a live Meta campaign to stop all spending immediately. Campaign and settings are preserved — use enable_meta_campaign to resume. Requires Starter plan or higher.

metadata.name: get_meta_campaign_stats
metadata.description: Get performance metrics for a Meta campaign: impressions, clicks, spend (USD), CTR, CPM, and conversions. Use to evaluate performance before budget decisions. Requires Starter plan or higher.

date_preset.description: Time range: today, yesterday, last_7d, last_14d, last_30d, this_month. Default: last_7d.

metadata.name: update_meta_campaign_budget
metadata.description: Change the daily budget of a Meta campaign. Takes effect immediately. Increase to scale a winning campaign, decrease to throttle spend. Minimum $1/day. Requires Starter plan or higher.

metadata.name: delete_meta_campaign
metadata.description: Permanently delete a Meta campaign and all its ad sets and ads. Cannot be undone. Use pause_meta_campaign to stop spending temporarily. Requires Starter plan or higher.

campaign_id.description: Meta campaign ID to permanently delete.

metadata.name: list_tiktok_campaigns
metadata.description: List all campaigns in the TikTok ad account with campaign ID, name, status, objective, and budget. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

metadata.name: create_tiktok_campaign
metadata.description: Create a complete TikTok ad campaign in one call — campaign + ad group with targeting + ad. Created in DISABLE state. Call enable_tiktok_campaign to activate. TikTok minimum budget is $20/day. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

metadata.name: enable_tiktok_campaign
metadata.description: Activate a disabled TikTok campaign so it starts running. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

metadata.name: pause_tiktok_campaign
metadata.description: Pause a running TikTok campaign to stop all spending. Settings preserved — use enable_tiktok_campaign to resume. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

metadata.name: get_tiktok_campaign_stats
metadata.description: Get performance metrics for a TikTok campaign: impressions, clicks, spend, CTR, CPC, conversions. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

metadata.name: update_tiktok_campaign_budget
metadata.description: Change the daily budget of a TikTok campaign. TikTok minimum is $20/day. Requires Pro plan or higher ($69/mo).

notes: Python FastMCP server factory in quack/server.py; quack.py creates server via create_server() and runs stdio/SSE.

metadata.name: submit_code
metadata.description: Submit Python code for analysis

parameters.name: job_type
parameters.description: Type of analysis to perform ("lint" or "static_analysis")

metadata.name: submit_code_for_linting
metadata.description: Submit Python code for linting analysis

metadata.name: submit_code_for_static_analysis
metadata.description: Submit Python code for static type analysis

metadata.name: get_job_results
metadata.description: Get the results of a previously submitted job

metadata.name: list_jobs
metadata.description: List all jobs and their statuses
